headline: Fresh Look At Verizon (VZ) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Performance
summary: Fresh look at Verizon Communications after recent share performance Verizon Communications (VZ) has drawn fresh attention after mixed recent share performance, with the stock rising over the past month but declining over the past 3 months and over the past week. See our latest analysis for Verizon Communications. At a share price of US$46.37, Verizon’s recent pattern shows short term momentum fading, with the 1 day share price return down 1.47% and the 90 day share price return down 5.39%...
